decisions.name: Use YOLOv5 model for face detection.
decisions.rationale: It is a state-of-the-art model for object detection and can accurately detect faces in real-time.

decisions.name: Use Background Subtraction (BS) for hand movement detection.
decisions.rationale: It is a widely used technique for separating moving objects from the background and can accurately detect hand movements.

decisions.name: Use contours detection for gesture recognition.
decisions.rationale: It is a widely used technique for detecting the borders of objects and can accurately recognize gestures.

decisions.name: Use Histogram Equalization for image contrast optimization.
decisions.rationale: It is a widely used technique for improving image contrast and can enhance the accuracy of face and hand detection.

decisions.name: Implement real-time collaboration.
decisions.rationale: It is a key feature of the system and enables users to interact with each other in real-time.

decisions.name: Minimize latency.
decisions.rationale: It is crucial for the system to analyze gestures and reflect the corresponding action on the projected surface in real-time with minimal latency.

decisions.name: Pricing competitive with other touch projectors.
decisions.rationale: It is essential for the system to be priced competitively to attract users and enable them to run the system with their available hardware.

components.name: Face Detection Module
components.responsibility: Detect the user's face using the YOLOv5 model, and use contours detection, Gaussian blur, Background Subtraction (BS), and Histogram Equalization for image processing.

components.name: Hand Movement Detection Module
components.responsibility: Detect the user's hand movement using Background Subtraction (BS), and use contours detection, Gaussian blur, and Histogram Equalization for image processing.

components.name: Gesture Recognition Module
components.responsibility: Recognize gestures using contours detection, Gaussian blur, Background Subtraction (BS), and Histogram Equalization for image processing.

components.name: Face Recognition Module
components.responsibility: Recognize faces using contours detection, Gaussian blur, Background Subtraction (BS), and Histogram Equalization for image processing.

components.name: Hand Tracking Module
components.responsibility: Track hands using contours detection, Gaussian blur, Background Subtraction (BS), and Histogram Equalization for image processing.

components.name: Single-Hand Interaction Module
components.responsibility: Support single-hand interaction using contours detection, Gaussian blur, Background Subtraction (BS), and Histogram Equalization for image processing.

components.name: Customizable Gesture Module
components.responsibility: Allow users to customize actions for specific gestures using contours detection, Gaussian blur, Background Subtraction (BS), and Histogram Equalization for image processing.

runtime_flow.action: Trigger single-hand interaction with customized gesture

critique.issue: The YOLOv5 model may not be suitable for real-time face detection, which could impact the system's low-latency requirement.
The use of Background Subtraction (BS) may not be effective in dynamic environments, which could impact the system's real-time collaboration requirement.

The use of contours detection, Gaussian blur, Background Subtraction (BS), and Histogram Equalization may not be sufficient for recognizing complex gestures, which could impact the system's customizable gesture requirement.

The use of contours detection, Gaussian blur, Background Subtraction (BS), and Histogram Equalization may not be sufficient for recognizing faces in varying lighting conditions, which could impact the system's real-time collaboration requirement.

The use of contours detection, Gaussian blur, Background Subtraction (BS), and Histogram Equalization may not be sufficient for tracking hands in dynamic environments, which could impact the system's real-time collaboration requirement.
The system may not be able to support single-hand interaction in scenarios where the user's hand is partially occluded, which could impact the system's real-time collaboration requirement.
The system may not be able to support customizable gestures in scenarios where the user's hand is moving rapidly, which could impact the system's low-latency requirement.

critique.relationship: Face Detection Module -> Face Recognition Module
critique.issue: The data flow from the Face Detection Module to the Face Recognition Module may not be sufficient to support real-time face recognition, which could impact the system's low-latency requirement.

critique.relationship: Hand Movement Detection Module -> Hand Tracking Module
critique.issue: The data flow from the Hand Movement Detection Module to the Hand Tracking Module may not be sufficient to support real-time hand tracking, which could impact the system's real-time collaboration requirement.

critique.relationship: Hand Movement Detection Module -> Gesture Recognition Module
critique.issue: The event flow from the Hand Movement Detection Module to the Gesture Recognition Module may not be sufficient to support real-time gesture recognition, which could impact the system's low-latency requirement.
